creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to vladimir.chukharev from comment #1)

At the outset: Thank you for your feedback and approval.  The update is committed to the main branch.

I also reset the MAINTAINER field of all ports, as you requested, and MFH'ed it into the 2022Q1 branch.

Many thanks for all your efforts and I'd be happy if you would contribute to FreeBSD again at some point.
